summary: Phase 3 end-to-end testing: Backend 13/13 pytest cases passed (multi-cheque validation, edit payment with status recalc, customer/supplier payment reports, financial summary, counter settings with bill numbering). Frontend verified: Dashboard has no 'New Invoice' action, quick-new-order and quick-record-payment both open dialogs directly, Invoices page has no create button, Analytics page renders 3 charts with 4 period buttons, Payments page shows edit-payment button with preloaded amount, Reports page has all 4 new tabs (Customer Payments / Supplier Payments / Financial Summary / Settings) with Save button and 3 counter inputs.

design_issues.screen: All dialogs (Create Order, Record Payment, Edit Payment, etc.)
issues: Console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' - a11y issue; add <DialogDescription> to shadcn DialogContent to silence

passed_tests: Backend POST /api/payments cheque: sum=amount (6000+4000=10000) succeeds, invoice status updated to paid
Backend POST /api/payments cheque mismatch (6000+3000≠10000) returns 400
Backend POST /api/payments cheque missing cheque_number returns 400
Backend PUT /api/payments/{id} amount 10000→5000 recalcs invoice paid→partial, deleting reverts to unpaid
Backend PUT /api/payments/{non-existent} returns 404
Backend GET /api/reports/customer-payments with date_from/date_to returns items+total+count+proper fields
Backend GET /api/reports/supplier-payments returns newly created supplier payment
Backend GET /api/reports/financial-summary returns total_sales, total_profit, total_payables, customer_count
Backend GET /api/reports/financial-summary with 1990 range returns zeros
Backend GET /api/settings/counters returns {invoices,purchases,orders}
Backend PUT /api/settings/counters/invoices value below max rejected 400
Backend PUT /api/settings/counters/invoices value=N → next POST /api/invoices/from-order produces INV-{N+1}
Backend PUT /api/settings/counters/bogus invalid name rejected 400
Frontend Dashboard: 'New Invoice' button/text absent; only New Order / Record Payment / Analytics / Reports quick actions
Frontend Dashboard quick-new-order → navigates /orders and auto-opens Create Order dialog
Frontend Dashboard quick-record-payment → navigates /payments and auto-opens Record Payment dialog
Frontend Invoices page: no 'New Invoice' button, info banner 'Invoices are generated from Orders' shown
Frontend Analytics page loads with Total Sales / Total Profit cards, Sales Trend + Revenue vs Cost + Profit Trend charts (3 recharts wrappers) and 4 period buttons (data-testid period-30d/60d/90d/1y)
Frontend Payments page: edit icon per row, opens Edit dialog with amount preloaded (verified '5000' on existing record)
Frontend Payments: Add Allocation button exists for multi-invoice allocation
Frontend Reports page has 4 new tabs: Customer Payments, Supplier Payments, Financial Summary, Settings (all visible)
Frontend Settings tab has 3 numeric counter inputs and a Save button
action_items: [Optional] Add <DialogDescription> to shadcn DialogContent instances to resolve repeated Radix console warnings (a11y hygiene, non-functional)

[Optional] Consider exposing 'Add Cheque' button in the Record Payment dialog immediately adjacent to the method selector; currently the button only renders after method=cheque is chosen (functional but harder to discover in automated tests)
critical_code_review_comments: payments.py validate_cheques() allows payment_method=cheque with empty cheques array if legacy cheque_number is used — this is intentional for backward compatibility but may silently skip sum validation; document or enforce one path.
reports.financial_summary: per-invoice product lookup is an O(N*M) loop (same as Phase 2 dashboard). Consider batch $lookup for large datasets.
settings.set_counter: scans entire collection for max number. For large datasets this is O(N); consider sort({number_field:-1}).limit(1) with a proper index.

payments.update_payment: when data.amount is reduced below allocation total, the allocation-sum > new_amount check runs only when data.allocations is provided; if caller reduces amount without resending allocations, inconsistency (allocs > amount) is possible. Suggest validating amount vs existing allocations when amount changes.
No server-side validation that counter PUT requires admin role — get_current_user is generic. If non-admin users are ever added, bill numbering could be tampered with.
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed customer, supplier, product, order, invoice and tear down in fixture teardown; counter test restores nothing (counter remains at elevated value — acceptable since each run raises it)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 fully verified. Run /app/backend/tests/test_phase3.py (and test_phase2.py for regression). Frontend: Dashboard auto-open dialogs on ?new=1 work via useSearchParams in OrdersPage/PaymentsPage. Analytics period buttons carry data-testid='period-<30d|60d|90d|1y>'. Reports Settings tab has 3 counter inputs (invoices/purchases/orders). Edit payment dialog preloads fields including amount correctly.
rca_of_the_issue: No blocking issues found. Earlier tests that showed text like 'Total Profit' as False were false-negatives caused by CSS uppercase transform making inner_text() return 'TOTAL PROFIT' (case mismatch in assertion). Visual confirmation via screenshot proves the labels render correctly.
